positive: A symmetrical, intricate botanical arrangement featuring stylized moon flowers, bioluminescent jungle foliage, and delicate vines wrapping around an imaginary central pillar. The style is a highly detailed, elegant woodcut etching combined with modern sacred geometry lines. Focus on strong, contrasting black ink against a creamy white background. The composition must be central and balanced, suitable for a large chest print on apparel. Emphasize clean silhouettes, varying line weights, and negative space utilization. Highly detailed, vintage scientific illustration aesthetic, high contrast.
